title: xanthoxalis dillenii var. piletorum
intro: Xanthoxalis dillenii var. piletorum, also known as yellow sorrel, is a variety of the sorrel plant species. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xanthoxalis dillenii var. piletorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
